sections.paragraph: Arik Sharon, Ariel Sharon (1928-2014), 11th prime minister of Israel (until he was incapacitated by a stroke on January 4th 2006 and fell into a coma until his death in January 2014), held several positions as minister under different governments (served as Minister of Defence, Minister of Foreign Affairs, Minister of Commerce and Industry and Minister of Infrastructures), former general in the Israeli Defense Forces
